channel.title: github_trending
channel.description: Latest posts from https://github.com/trending. follow.is: None

item.title: hesreallyhim /awesome-claude-code | Python | N/A
item.description: A hand-picked collection of the finest of resources for the most awesome of agents, Claude Code, the undisputed champion of coding companions, from the unstoppable team at Anthropic PBC. A delectable showcase of top tier skills, ambidextrous agents, scintillating status lines, top notch developer tooling, and also we have plugins

item.title: kyutai-labs /pocket-tts | Python | N/A
item.description: A TTS that fits in your CPU (and pocket)

item.title: bradautomates /claude-video | Python | N/A
item.description: Give Claude the ability to watch any video. /watch downloads, extracts frames, transcribes, hands it all to Claude.

item.title: iOfficeAI /OfficeCLI | C# | N/A
item.description: OfficeCLI is the first and best Office suite purpose-built for AI agents to read, edit, and automate Word, Excel, and PowerPoint files. Free, open-source, single binary, no Office installation required.

item.title: dotnet /skills | C# | N/A
item.description: Repository for skills to assist AI coding agents with .NET and C#

item.title: steipete /CodexBar | Swift | N/A
item.description: Show usage stats for OpenAI Codex and Claude Code, without having to login.

item.title: AhmadIbrahiim /Website-downloader | HTML | N/A
item.description: 💡 Download the complete source code of any website (including all assets). [ Javascripts, Stylesheets, Images ] using Node.js

item.title: TencentCloud /CubeSandbox | Rust | N/A
item.description: Instant, Concurrent, Secure & Lightweight Sandbox for AI Agents.

item.title: asgeirtj /system_prompts_leaks | JavaScript | N/A
item.description: Extracted system prompts from Anthropic - Claude Fable 5, Opus 4.8, Claude Code, Claude Design. OpenAI - ChatGPT 5.5 Thinking, GPT 5.5 Instant, Codex. Google - Gemini 3.5 Flash, 3.1 Pro, Antigravity. xAI - Grok, Cursor, Copilot, VS Code, Perplexity, and more. Updated regularly.

item.title: ruvnet /RuView | Rust | N/A
item.description: π RuView turns commodity WiFi signals into real-time spatial intelligence, vital sign monitoring, and presence detection — all without a single pixel of video.

item.title: addyosmani /agent-skills | JavaScript | N/A
item.description: Production-grade engineering skills for AI coding agents.

item.title: Zackriya-Solutions /meetily | Rust | N/A
item.description: Privacy first, AI meeting assistant with 4x faster Parakeet/Whisper live transcription, speaker diarization, and Ollama summarization built on Rust. 100% local processing. no cloud required. Meetily (Meetly Ai -https://meetily.ai) is the #1 Self-hosted, Open-source Ai meeting note taker for macOS & Windows.

item.title: MadsLorentzen /ai-job-search | TypeScript | N/A
item.description: AI-powered job application framework built on Claude Code. Fork it, fill in your profile, and let Claude evaluate jobs, tailor CVs, write cover letters, and prepare you for interviews.
